name: suwol-atlas-maker
description: CLI and desktop GUI for building game-ready sprite atlases.
author: Suwol Atlas Maker contributors

scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npm run copy:i18n-locales && npm run build:preload
scripts.build:gui: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
scripts.pack:win: npm run icons:generate && npm run build:gui && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.pack:linux: npm run icons:generate && npm run build:gui && electron-builder --linux --dir
scripts.release:zip:win: npm run pack:win && npm run smoke:packaged:win && npm run zip:win && npm run verify:release:zip:win
scripts.release:verify: npm run typecheck && npm run i18n:check && npm test && npm run build && npm run build:gui && npm run pack:win && npm run smoke:packaged:win && npm run zip:win && npm run verify:release:zip:win
scripts.dist:zip: npm run pack:win && npm run zip:win
scripts.dist:win: npm run icons:generate && npm run build:gui && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.sample: npm run build && npm run generate:samples && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input ./samples/output --name sample_atlas --max-size 2048 --padding 2 --clean
scripts.sample:advanced: npm run build && npm run generate:samples:advanced && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input-advanced ./samples/output-advanced --name advanced_atlas --max-size 2048 --padding 2 --trim --extrude 1 --rotate --clean
scripts.sample:multipack: npm run build && npm run generate:samples:multipack && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input-multipack ./samples/output-multipack --name multipack_atlas --max-size 128 --padding 2 --trim --extrude 1 --rotate --clean
scripts.sample:packing: npm run build && npm run generate:samples:packing && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input-packing ./samples/output-packing-shelf --name packing_shelf --max-size 10 --padding 0 --algorithm shelf --clean && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input-packing ./samples/output-packing-maxrects --name packing_maxrects --max-size 10 --padding 0 --algorithm maxrects --clean
scripts.sample:pot: npm run build && npm run generate:samples && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input ./samples/output-pot/tight --name pot_tight --max-size 2048 --padding 2 --size-mode tight --clean && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input ./samples/output-pot/pot --name pot_power --max-size 2048 --padding 2 --size-mode pot --clean && node dist/cli/index.js make ./samples/input ./samples/output-pot/square-pot --name pot_square --max-size 2048 --padding 2 --size-mode square-pot --clean
scripts.sample:metadata: npm run build && npm run generate:samples:metadata && node dist/cli/index.js make --project ./samples/projects/metadata-demo.suwol-atlas.json
scripts.sample:editing: npm run build && npm run generate:samples:editing && node dist/cli/index.js make --project ./samples/projects/editing-demo.suwol-atlas.json
scripts.sample:ux: npm run build && npm run generate:samples:ux && node dist/cli/index.js make --project ./samples/projects/ux-demo.suwol-atlas.json
scripts.sample:batch: npm run build && npm run generate:samples && npm run generate:samples:advanced && npm run generate:samples:metadata && npm run generate:samples:editing && npm run generate:samples:ux && npm run generate:samples:batch && node dist/cli/index.js batch ./samples/projects
